news.t: First Trust Launches First Trust Bloomberg Artificial Intelligence ETF

holdings.infoBox: FAI is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 8.15%, Advanced Micro Devices at 6.91%, Broadcom at 6.87%, Alphabet at 6.86%, and NVIDIA at 6.57%.

overview.description: The First Trust Bloomberg Artificial Intelligence ETF (FAI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies in the artificial intelligence AI industry. It comprises the top 50 securities globally by revenue and themes assessments. FAI was launched on Nov 20, 2024 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Bloomberg Global Artificial Intelligence Select Index (CAD)

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust Bloomberg Artificial Intelligence ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
